name: Test for Modal Dialogs: check new window message
Test for Auto Complete: enter part of color name, wait for dropdown, then select required color and check that right colors are selected
Test for Check Box: check main box and verify that all sub boxes are checked
Test for Browser Windows: check new window
Test for Browser Windows: check new tab
Test for Interactions: resize box and check size after the action
Test for Edit fields: enter data, confirm and check result
Test for Modal Dialogs: check new window
Test for Browser Windows: check new window message
Test for Alerts: check see alert - check that alert with text is displayed after clicking
Test for Slider: set value - move the slider with arrows and check set value
